'''Cha-Val Sha-Vak''' was a former [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] and criminal who was said to have the [[Death mark/Legends|death sentence]] in five [[Star system/Legends|systems]]. He wore a [[Cloak/Legends|cloak]] and mask that made it impossible to identify his [[Species/Legends|species]]. He was presumed to be a [[Gender/Legends|male]] because of his size and bulk. He was a mysterious being who was said to move like a wraith through the shadows. Although he was a patron at the [[Ace of Sabres]] [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] establishment he never actually played any of the games of chance. He lived at the establishment.

Unknown to most the patrons of the Ace of Sabres Cha-Val Sha-Vak was in the employment of [[Sibarra]]. He performed the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] dirty work such as [[Assassin/Legends|assassinations]], [[Thief/Legends|robberies]], debt collection and extortion. Any work that [[Dunan Par'Ell]], head of security at the Ace, could not handle was given to Cha-Val Sha-Vak. There was considerable tension between Par'Ell and Cha-Val Sha-Vak.
